hero.subtitle: Premier volleyball club developing elite athletes across northeast Indiana. Six age divisions. One relentless standard.

videoBanner.subtitle: Six teams. Hundreds of hours on the court. One relentless pursuit of excellence.

announcements.subtitle: News, achievements, and announcements from the club.

teams.subtitle: Six competitive divisions developing elite players from 12U through 18U across northeast Indiana.

tryouts.description: Tryouts will be held Wednesday, July 1 and Thursday, July 2. Can't make it? Register and email us at legendssportsacademyfw@gmail.com — secondary tryouts later in July, with a final tryout in October to fill remaining spots.
tryouts.feeLabel: tryout fee · payable at event or via Venmo/PayPal
tryouts.locationsNote: 6:00–7:30 PM · Ages 14 & under  ·  7:30–9:00 PM · Ages 15 & older

programs.title: Programs
programs.subtitle: From first-time club players to college-bound athletes — we have a program for every level.

items.title: Club Volleyball
items.description: Competitive club teams for players ages 12–18. Six divisions spanning Blue and Pink brackets, competing in regional and national tournaments across the Midwest.

items.title: Recruiting
items.description: We actively support college-bound athletes with recruiting resources, film, and coach connections.

items.title: Camps & Clinics
items.description: Youth development camps and position-specific clinics open to all skill levels throughout the year.

fees.subtitle: Multiple payment options available. Always include your player name and team in the note.

rules.text: Fees are due by the first practice of each month.
A $25 late fee applies after 5 days past the due date.
Checks payable to Legends Sports Academy

fees.qrInstruction: Scan with your phone camera or app. Always include your player name in the payment note.

sponsors.subtitle: These businesses make our club possible. Please support them.
sponsors.becomeDescription: Support youth athletics in Fort Wayne and get your brand in front of our community.

footer.tagline: Premier youth volleyball club in Fort Wayne, Indiana. Developing elite athletes and legendary character.
footer.copyright: Impact Legends Volleyball Club · Fort Wayne, IN 46805
